title: Makal
desc: After a long absence, a man returns to live with his wife and daughter. However, he has to face various obstacles in his attempt to reconnect with his family.

title: Black Coffee
desc: A woman faces sexual harassment at the hands of her boss. Later, she decides to teach him a lesson with the help of her colleague.

title: Darmmayodhavu Garudan
desc: Garuda inherits immense strength from his divine parents but must serve his cruel step-mother. Soon, he struggles against the snakes to release his mother from her heavy chains of servitude.

title: Archana Chechi L L B
desc: Archana, a lawyer, acts as guardian to her three younger brothers in their village joint family. Having sacrificed her marriage for them, life takes a turn when her ex-husband remarries.

title: Othiri Othiri Swapnangal
desc: Abhirami's friends grow sceptical when she receives a call from Sreenath.

title: Ottashikharam
desc: A childless couple finds a surrogate woman in order to fulfil their dreams of parenthood. However, complexities brew when the question of who will have the child arises.

title: Super Kanmani
desc: Rejected by most of her family and community since infancy due to a birth defect, Kanmani aspires to become a fashion designer and support her father.

title: Oru Chiri Iru Chiri Bumper Chiri
desc: Skilled participants take the stage to perform a series of hilarious skits to entertain the audience and the judges to win prizes.
